- Check the tide chart before you go — you want to hit it at or near low tide, ideally a "minus tide" if you can swing it
- Wear shoes with grip (the rocks get crazy slick with algae)
- Look but don't take — Abalone Cove is a protected marine reserve, so everything stays where it is
- The hike down is easier than the hike back up, so pace yourselves

Enjoy LA!
